D0500J1 Staff Assessment of Resident Mood - Short Temper Code CHAR 1 The data in this column contains the staff assessment whether the resident is short-tempered or easily annoyed. -=Not assessed/no information
0=No (enter 0 in column 2)
1=Yes (enter 0-3 in column 2)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
